LOW.title: Great cognitive day
LOW.desc: You're energized and ready. Wizan unlocked all your tasks for today.

MEDIUM.title: Good cognitive day

HIGH.title: High cognitive load

tips.LOW: Great energy! Tackle your hardest tasks first while you're sharp.
tips.MEDIUM: Take a 5-minute break every 45 minutes to maintain focus.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is your daily productivity overview.
dashboard.ai_error: Unable to load AI briefing at the moment.

hero.title:
Plan your day
against the mind
you woke up with, not yesterday's.
hero.sub: Wizan starts every morning with a two-minute check on your mental capacity, then rebalances your tasks, your study plan, and even the tone of your AI assistant around that number.

how.title: The same task list lands differently depending on what you brought to it.
how.sub: Three students, three mornings, three completely different plans — generated from one quiz.

card1.title: Postponed, gently
card1.body: Heavy tasks get pushed to a lighter day automatically. The planning agent softens its tone and only surfaces what's truly urgent.

card2.title: Allowed, with steps
card2.body: Mid-load tasks are broken into smaller sub-steps so nothing feels like one large undifferentiated block of effort.

card3.title: Cleared for deep work
card3.body: Hard limits lift. The regulator agent stacks your most demanding tasks first, while you have the headroom for them.

moments.title: What it actually feels like to use Wizan.
moments.sub: Hover each scene — it's the same student, four points in one morning.

card1.title: 1. Two minutes, eyes barely open
card1.body: A short quiz — sleep, focus, mood — before you've even opened a task list.

card2.title: 2. A plan that matches the number
card2.body: Today's score reorders the list — heavy things wait, light things lead.

card3.title: 3. One task fully broken down
card3.body: Big assignment in, ordered sub-steps out — in a tone that fits your state.

card4.title: 4. Just say the task
card4.body: Speak a task out loud and Wizan transcribes it, then figures out the priority and deadline on its own — no typing, no forms.

quiz.title: Three quick questions. One real number.
quiz.sub: This is a shortened version of the actual morning quiz — answer honestly and watch the scale on the right react.
quiz.q1: How many hours did you sleep last night?
quiz.q2: How scattered does your focus feel right now?
quiz.q3: How's your stress level this morning?
quiz.visualLabel: Wizan's read on your morning, live
quiz.verdict_low: Light day recommended — heavier tasks get postponed automatically.
quiz.verdict_mid: Solid morning — tasks get broken into manageable steps.
quiz.verdict_high: High capacity — hard limits lift, deep work is cleared.

cta.title:
Find out what today's
balance looks like.
cta.sub: Two minutes, one quiz, a plan that actually matches the day you're having.

footer.meta: Capstone project · Cognitive load management for students
